overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a cinematic game showing a hooded character exploring a snowy Viking settlement at dusk. The character walks through the village with thatched-roof longhouses, crosses a wooden bridge over a stream, passes through a central square with other villagers, and ascends stone stairs to an upper level.

scene_state.functional_zone: snowy village path between thatched roof longhouses

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the snowy village street between traditional wooden longhouses with thatched roofs

entered.detail: large wooden longhouse with steep thatched roof and decorative wooden posts
smaller thatched roof building with stone foundation
rough wooden log fence lining the path
low stone wall covered in snow

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrow snowy path in a Viking village at dusk. Traditional thatched-roof longhouses line the route, with wooden fences and stone walls visible. The scene is quiet and empty, with blue-purple twilight sky visible between buildings.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden bridge crossing over icy stream

events.description: character steps onto wooden bridge crossing the partially frozen stream

agents.ego_description: carefully crossing the wooden bridge over the icy water flowing beneath

entered.detail: wooden plank bridge with snow-covered surface spanning the water
partially frozen stream with ice along the banks and flowing water in center
stone retaining walls along the stream edges

segments.scene_description: The character crosses a wooden bridge over a partially frozen stream. The wooden planks are covered in snow, and stone walls line the water banks. The village buildings fall behind as the character approaches the central square.

scene_state.functional_zone: open village square with wooden gate and market structures

events.description: exiting bridge into open village square with wooden archway and gathering area
light snowfall begins to fall in the village square

agents.ego_description: walking through the village center toward the wooden gate, passing other villagers and market structures

notable_agents.action: villager in light clothing walking ahead toward the wooden gate
villager standing near the wooden scaffolding structure

entered.detail: tall wooden archway structure marking the entrance to the village center
wooden market stall with red fabric canopy
tall carved stone pillar or monolith standing in the square
wooden scaffolding and beams near the buildings

segments.scene_description: The character enters an open village square featuring a prominent wooden gate arch and a market stall with a red canopy. Other villagers are present, walking or standing near a stone monolith. Light snow begins to fall as the character moves through the space.

scene_state.functional_zone: snow-covered stone staircase ascending the hillside

events.description: character begins ascending the steep stone staircase toward the upper village

agents.ego_description: climbing the snow-covered stone steps leading up to the upper level of the settlement

entered.detail: wide stone staircase covered in snow leading upward
small wooden cabin with lit windows at the top of the stairs
snow-covered evergreen trees on the hillside

segments.scene_description: The character ascends a steep stone staircase covered in snow, leaving the village square behind. The path is flanked by snowbanks and evergreen trees, with a wooden cabin visible at the top of the stairs.

scene_state.functional_zone: upper village path lined with wooden cabins

events.description: reaching the top of the stairs and entering the upper village area with cabins

agents.ego_description: walking along the snowy upper path past wooden cabins and stone walls at the higher elevation

entered.detail: stone wall lining the right side of the upper path

segments.scene_description: Having reached the top of the stairs, the character walks along an upper village path. The wooden cabin that was at the top of the stairs is now on the left, and stone walls line the path. The area is quieter and more secluded than the lower village.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a quiet Viking settlement at dusk that transitions from narrow residential paths to a bustling central square and finally to a secluded upper terrace. It begins by following the character along a snowy path lined with thatched-roof longhouses under a blue-purple twilight sky. As the character moves forward, the scene shifts to a wooden bridge crossing a partially frozen stream, leaving the houses behind to enter an open village square featuring a red-canopied market stall and a stone monolith. Light snow begins to fall as the camera follows the character away from the villagers and up a steep, snow-covered stone staircase flanked by evergreen trees. The journey finally concludes as the character reaches the top of the stairs and walks along a quiet upper path past a wooden cabin and stone walls.
